payload.long_description: Pair of white cotton kitchen/tea towels with blue-gray printed graphics and legible word 'LOVE' on the right towel; hanging side-by-side with lower edges slightly folded and cut off by the crop, decorative woven texture visible — photographed close-up (approx. 0.6 m from camera).
